omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Moreover, when you participate in our events or promotions, we may ask for your name, phone number, address, email address and any other information required to deliver prizes and to respond to inquiries. Also, when you subscribe to the Newsletter, such as WEBTOON ads Newsletter or Canvas Newsletter, we collect your email address to send you updates on advertising placements, events, and other relevant information. Furthermore, you may choose to provide your name, company name, and job title to help us tailor relevant business communications and better understand our audience. However, these details are optional, and your decision to provide them will not affect your ability to receive the newsletter.

Creator Profile information: We may request information that you have voluntarily shared with the public through your Creator Profile page, including your profile picture, bio, social media links, website and more.
We may request that your PayPal ID or Patreon ID be linked to the Service.
We may request your uTip ID to provide reward or bonus.

AD Revenue Payment Information: If you choose to provide your PayPal account, we may ask for additional information such as your Name (Legal First Name/Business Alias), Full name/Business Name, Country, Residency, Address, Postal code, E-mail, Signature and Tax ID (or Social Security Number where applicable) for tax processing purposes.
